2606.10722.title: Continual LLM Upcycling: A Predictor-Gated Bank-Wise Sparsity Training Recipe for Dense-to-Sparse LLMs
2606.10722.paper_summary: We study dense-to-sparse continual training as a way to construct channel-sparse large language models from dense checkpoints. Starting from a Qwen2.5-8B dense backbone, we continue training at 32K context and introduce a predictor-gated sparse SwiGLU FFN in the 32K stage. For each token and layer, we use a low-rank predictor to produce FFN-channel routing logits. We then apply a bank-wise top-k rule to retain 16 channels in every 64-channel bank, yielding 4x sparsity in the FFN intermediate activation. Unlike post-hoc sparse inference methods, the routing module is placed on the main language modeling path and optimized during continual training, enabling the dense model to be upcycled into a hardware-oriented sparse model. We report the architecture, training recipe, benchmark performance, and training lessons. We also identify a layer-local long-context failure mode on RULER-CWE and propose a single-layer repair algorithm that substantially improves the affected length range.
2606.10722.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究從密集檢查點構建通道稀疏的大型語言模型的密集到稀疏的持續訓練方法。從 Qwen2.5-8B 密集骨幹開始，我們在 32K 上下文中繼續訓練，並在 32K 階段引入一個預測器驅動的稀疏 SwiGLU FFN。對於每個標記和層，我們使用低秩預測器生成 FFN 通道路由邏輯。我們然後應用一個按銀行計算的 top-k 規則，以在每個 64 通道的銀行中保留 16 個通道，從而在 FFN 中間激活中產生 4 倍的稀疏性。與事後稀疏推理方法不同，路由模塊被放置在主要的語言建模路徑上，並在持續訓練期間進行優化，使得密集模型能夠轉化為面向硬體的稀疏模型。我們報告了架構、訓練食譜、基準性能和訓練經驗教訓。我們還在 RULER-CWE 上識別了一種層局部的長上下文失效模式，並提出了一種單層修復算法，顯著改善了受影響的長度範圍。
2606.10722.author: Ruixuan Huang et.al.
2606.10722.authors: Ruixuan Huang, Jinyuan Shi, Hantao Huang, Yifan Huang, Ziyi Guan, Hao Zeng, Ian En-Hsu Yen, Minghui Yu
